name: OpenEQ
description: macOS audio equalizer — system-wide EQ via Core Audio Tap, 10/31-band graphic EQ, 5-band parametric EQ, FFT spectrum analyzer

import_order: Apple frameworks first (AVFoundation, CoreAudio, Accelerate), then Foundation/SwiftUI, then project modules
conventions.naming: PascalCase types, camelCase vars/funcs, UpperCamelCase for enum cases
conventions.observation: Use @Observable macro (iOS 17+ / macOS 14+) for all view models
conventions.audio_thread_safety: No allocations, locks, or GCD sync inside tap callbacks or IOProcs. Use atomic flags and pre-allocated buffers.
conventions.error_handling: Use enums conforming to LocalizedError for domain errors; prefer throws over Result.
conventions.file_structure: One type per file, grouped by layer: Views/, ViewModels/, AudioCore/, Models/, Services/, Utilities/

testing_strategy: See docs/TESTING_STRATEGY.md — XCTest for unit/integration, manual for audio quality
